dogs.name: Esther
dogs.og: Meet Esther, an Adult Female Boxer & American Bully currently available for adoption at Rosalie and Friends. Could this be your new best friend? Learn more and apply today!
dogs.description:
Meet Esther  
Affectionately known as  Essie
Breed: Boxer Mix
Age: 8 years
Weight: 40 lbs
**Adoption fee sponsored by: The Mathes 
 Meet Esther.
Some dogs arrive like a whirlwind.
Esther arrived as a fighter.

This sweet 8 year old Boxer/Bully mix came to us quite literally on deaths door from starvation. Emaciated, exhausted, and hanging onto life by a thread, Esthers future was heartbreakingly uncertain.

But Esther had other plans.
Today, what shines through is not her past, but her incredible spirit. She has a gentle, peaceful nature that somehow makes every room feel calmer. No chaos. No wild antics. Just a lovable, affectionate dog whose favorite hobbies include snuggling, handing out kisses, and being close to her people.

And yes... she is definitely a kisser. Consider yourself warned.

Esther is the kind of dog who sleeps soundly through the night, isnt destructive, and believes a cozy bed and quality time with her humans are among lifes greatest treasures.

She gets along beautifully with a wide variety of dog friends and would happily welcome a canine companion in her future home.

Shes also been working hard on her leash manners. Shes still learning, but she has made wonderful improvements and keeps getting better every day.

What Esther wants most isnt complicated:

A home full of love. Humans ready for snuggles. 
A soft place to land. Maybe a dog friend, but would be happy to be a solo dog soaking up all the love too. And definitely snacks.

For a dog who once fought simply to survive, Esther is remarkably soft, trusting, and full of love. Now all she needs is a family to finally call her own.

Could that someone be you?
    
 Prior to meeting or adopting any of our wonderful animals, we ask that you please fill out our online application: https://form.jotform.com/223268341300041

 We are a 100% volunteer organization and have to work other jobs to pay the bills. Please give us up to 48 hours to respond. 

Submission of an adoption application does not obligate you to adopt nor does it guarantee approval. We look forward to hearing from you. 


Please note all animals in the home must be altered, up to date on vaccines, and be on heartworm prevention. We understand there are some special cases and will take those into consideration.

dogs.name: Ernie
dogs.og: Meet Ernie, a Young Male American Bully currently available for adoption at Rosalie and Friends. Could this be your new best friend? Learn more and apply today!
dogs.description:
SPONSORED ADOPTION FEE!!
    Meet Ernie! 
Ernie is a handsome 1-year-old American Bully weighing in at 55 pounds of pure sweetness. While he may be a little shy when meeting new people, don't let his reserved nature fool youonce Ernie trusts you, you'll discover a loyal, loving best friend who just wants to be by your side.
This smart boy is both kennel and potty trained, and every evening he happily trots into his kennel, ready for bedtime and his favorite bedtime biscuit. Ernie loves spending time with his foster dog siblings and thrives when he has canine friends to play with. Whether he's zooming around the yard, exploring the outdoors, or lounging with his people, he's happiest when he's part of the action.
Ernie gets along wonderfully with dogs of all sizes, is cat-friendly, and is gentle around children. Because he gains confidence from other dogs, he'd love a home with a friendly canine companion to show him the ropes.
An adventurous family with a fenced yard and a love for the outdoors would be Ernie's dream come true. He's still polishing his leash skills, but he has excellent recall and enjoys off-leash adventures in safe environments. Most of all, Ernie is looking for a patient family willing to give him a little time to settle in and blossom.
If you're ready to earn the trust of an incredibly special dog, Ernie is ready to fill your life with love, loyalty, and plenty of tail wags.
Prior to meeting or adopting any of our wonderful animals, we ask that you please fill out our online application: https://form.jotform.com/223268341300041

 We are a 100% volunteer organization and have to work other jobs to pay the bills. Please give us up to 48 hours to respond.

dogs.name: Liza
dogs.og: Meet Liza, an Adult Female Catahoula Leopard Dog currently available for adoption at Rosalie and Friends. Could this be your new best friend? Learn more and apply today!
dogs.description:
Adoption fee sponsored by: DR Horton Homes

Meet Eliza! 
Eliza is a 1-year-old  catahoula mix with the happiest heart you'll ever meet. While she has a rare skin condition called Epidermolysis Bullosa Acquisita that requires medication every few days and the occasional medicated bath, it doesn't slow her down one bit. She wakes up every day ready to love life, wiggle her whole body with excitement, and remind everyone that she's just a happy puppy.
Outside, Eliza loves adventures, long walks, and soaking up the sunshine with her dog friends. Inside, she's a calm, easygoing girl who even tucks herself into her crate when she's ready for bed. She's potty trained, crate trained, leash trained, and eager to learn—this smart girl picks up new things quickly!
Eliza gets along with dogs, cats, and kids, and she'd love a confident canine companion to help her continue building her confidence. She can be a little shy around loud men at first, but with patience and kindness, her sweet personality shines through.
Her perfect family will see past her skin condition and recognize the incredible dog underneath. Eliza doesn't let her diagnosis define her, and neither should you. She's looking for a fun, loving family who will embrace her for the joyful, affectionate, sunshine-loving girl she is.
If you're looking for a loyal adventure buddy with a heart of gold and the sweetest wiggle butt around, Eliza is waiting to meet you. 

    Prior to meeting or adopting any of our wonderful animals, we ask that you please fill out our online application: https://form.jotform.com/223268341300041

 We are a 100% volunteer organization and have to work other jobs to pay the bills. Please give us up to 48 hours to respond. 

Submission of an adoption application does not obligate you to adopt nor does it guarantee approval. We look forward to hearing from you. 


Please note all animals in the home must be altered, up to date on vaccines, and be on heartworm prevention. We understand there are some special cases and will take those into consideration.

dogs.name: Storm
dogs.og: Meet Storm, an Adult Female Shepherd & Labrador Retriever currently available for adoption at Rosalie and Friends. Could this be your new best friend? Learn more and apply today!
dogs.description:
Meet Storm, a shy but sweet 1.5-year-old mixed breed who’s house trained, uses a doggy door, and is ready to thrive in a calm and patient home. Once she feels safe, she becomes a gentle, affectionate companion who enjoys couch or bed snuggles while respecting boundaries. Storm does best with medium to large dog friends who can be both playmates and confidence boosters, but she’s not a match for cats or birds. Treat-motivated and semi-active, she loves outdoor play, sunbathing, and toys, and will benefit from a securely fenced yard as she continues to build leash confidence. With time and love, Storm will reward her adopter with quiet loyalty and a heart full of trust.

dogs.name: Blue Bell
dogs.og: Meet Blue Bell, a Young Female Retriever & Shar-Pei currently available for adoption at Rosalie and Friends. Could this be your new best friend? Learn more and apply today!
dogs.description:
Meet Blue Bell
Discover the joy of Blue Bell, a vibrant 8-month-old bundle of love currently weighing 30 pounds whose  irresistible smile lights up the room. This playful companion thrives on connection, greeting you with a favorite toy and a tap dance that sparks laughter. Blue Bell harmonizes beautifully with dogs, kids, and anyone game for fun, spreading positivity wherever she goes. With a mysterious mix of breeds, she brings a unique blend of snuggles, fluffy charm, and a mesmerizing wavy blue and white coat, not to mention a face that's endearingly sweet. Well-versed in crate training and an adept pupil in potty training, Blue Bell is ready to bring boundless joy into your life - if you're ready to open your heart and home, apply to meet her today!
    Prior to meeting or adopting any of our wonderful animals, we ask that you please fill out our online application: https://form.jotform.com/223268341300041

dogs.name: Noodles
dogs.og: Meet Noodles, a Puppy Male Retriever & Terrier currently available for adoption at Rosalie and Friends. Could this be your new best friend? Learn more and apply today!
dogs.description:
Noodles is proof that even the wildest puppy can grow into quite the gentleman.

Sure, he still has that puppy curiosity. Every leaf, squirrel, puddle, and mysterious smell deserves a proper investigation. But the tiny tornado phase? He's traded that in for "debonair gentleman in training."

 Noodles is the perfect mix of fun and sweet. He explores the world with childlike wonder, greets every new person with a wagging tail and a smile, and thinks water play is one of life's greatest inventions.

He recently enjoyed a day out at the park and absolutely nailed it. He walked nicely on leash, met an older child appropriately, and showed everyone what a great companion he's becoming. Even when curiosity got the best of him and he popped up to get a closer look, it was gentle curiosity, not a full-speed body slam. His excitement comes with manners, which is a pretty impressive trick for a young pup.
With just a little continued training and consistency, Noodles is going to be the kind of dog that has people asking, "Where did you find him?"

If you're looking for a happy-go-lucky best friend who is equal parts adventure buddy, cuddle companion, and amateur puddle inspector, 

Noodles is ready to apply for the position.
Find Noodles on our Petfinder page or in our Available for Adoption album, then submit your application before someone else realizes this handsome goofball is the complete package.
Prior to meeting or adopting any of our wonderful animals, please fill out our online application:

https://form.jotform.com/223268341300041

We are a 100% volunteer organization and all work full-time jobs outside of rescue, so please allow up to 48 hours for a response. Submission of an application does not obligate you to adopt and does not guarantee approval.

dogs.name: Crumpet
dogs.og: Meet Crumpet, a Puppy Female American Bully currently available for adoption at Rosalie and Friends. Could this be your new best friend? Learn more and apply today!
dogs.description:
Crumpet is ready to spill the tea! 
This Cinderella story has gone from crusty to classy, and now this sweet girl is ready for her forever home!
Crumpet is a spunky 9 month-old pup weighing in at 45 chunky pounds of love. If snacks and snuggles are your thing, shes already your soulmate. 
Shes a big fan of:
 Water play
 Doggie friends
 Treats
 Cuddles and attention
Crumpet would love a home with a playful canine buddy to hang with, but shes willing to make exceptions for humans who are committed to giving her the love and time she knows she deserves.
Her dream setup? A home with a fenced yard where she can zoom, play, and soak up the good life. Apartment living just isnt her style.
Ready to make Crumpet part of your family? Shes waiting to meet you! 

Thank you for your interest in adopting from Rosalie and Friends.
    Prior to meeting or adopting any of our wonderful animals, we ask that you please fill out our online application: https://form.jotform.com/223268341300041

 We are a 100% volunteer organization and have to work other jobs to pay the bills. Please give us up to 48 hours to respond.

dogs.name: Portia
dogs.og: Meet Portia, a Young Female American Staffordshire Terrier currently available for adoption at Rosalie and Friends. Could this be your new best friend? Learn more and apply today!
dogs.description:
Sponsored Adoption Fee!
Meet Portia! 
This goofy 9 month old, 31-pound bully mix is equal parts adventure buddy, cuddle bug, and professional snack enthusiast.
Her favorite things? Running around outside, playing with her people, car rides, toys, treats, and burrowing under the blankets when she's finally worn herself out. She's basically a tiny athlete by day and a blanket burrito by night.
Portia didn't have an easy start in life. She came from a severe abuse situation, but she has chosen joy anyway. Every single day she wakes up excited to see what life has in store, and watching her learn that the world can be safe and full of love is something truly special. 
She's still a puppy, which means she's working on her manners. She gets excited, occasionally forgets that kitchen counters aren't buffets, and believes snacks are everyone's favorite hobby. The good news? She sits beautifully for treats, waits patiently for meals, and is eager to keep learning.
Dog friendly Cat curious Best with older kids Crate trained Leash trained Mostly potty trained Loves adventures and would make an awesome walking, hiking, or adventure partner
Portia is looking for an active family with a fenced yard who will laugh at her goofy antics, keep her busy, and then let her snuggle under the covers at the end of the day.
Her past may have been heartbreaking, but her future doesn't have to be.
Could that future be with you? 


To meet Portia, apply below through Rosalie and Friends:
https://form.jotform.

dogs.name: Penelope
dogs.og: Meet Penelope, an Adult Female Rat Terrier currently available for adoption at Rosalie and Friends. Could this be your new best friend? Learn more and apply today!
dogs.description:
Meet Penelope 

Penelope is a 13lb, 2.5 year-old Rat Terrier mix with a remarkable story of resilience.

She came to us from a severe hoarding and neglect situation, arriving extremely emaciated, shut down, and heartworm positive. Her world had been very small, but with time, patience, and love, Penelope has worked incredibly hard to build her confidence, regain her health, and discover what it means to feel safe.

Today, she's completed her heartworm treatment, finished all of her veterinary care, and is ready to find a family of her own.

Penelope is looking for a patient, understanding home that will give her the time she needs to settle in and adjust to new surroundings. While change can be overwhelming for her at first, the reward is a loyal companion unlike any other.

Why you'll fall in love with Penelope:
 She is incredibly affectionate. Once she trusts you, she's the definition of a Velcro dog. If she had her way, she'd spend every moment curled up beside you (or on your lap!), burrowed under a cozy blanket, soaking up all the love she missed out on.
 Once she knows she's safe, she walks beautifully on a leash and is happiest simply being with her person.
 She is sweet and gentle, and every new experience she conquers is another reminder of just how far she's come.


She gets along well with other dogs, though she's a little possessive of her favorite spot: your lap! She'd much rather be the one soaking up your cuddles. She is nervous but polite with cats. Penelope currently lives with children and does well but older kids would be best in a new environment. Toddlers can be a bit scary and unpredictable to her. 

Penelope isn't looking for perfection—she's looking for someone willing to see the beautiful dog she's become and continue helping her bloom. The patience you invest in her will be repaid with unwavering devotion and endless snuggles.

Could you be the person to show Penelope that she's finally home?

If you'd like to open your heart to this sweet girl, we'd love to hear from you. Apply below. 
    Prior to meeting or adopting any of our wonderful animals, we ask that you please fill out our online application: https://form.jotform.com/223268341300041

 We are a 100% volunteer organization and have to work other jobs to pay the bills. Please give us up to 48 hours to respond. 

Submission of an adoption application does not obligate you to adopt nor does it guarantee approval. We look forward to hearing from you. 

Please note all animals in the home must be altered, up to date on vaccines, and be on heartworm prevention. We understand there are some special cases and will take those into consideration.

dogs.name: Rukus
dogs.og: Meet Rukus, a Puppy Male Labrador Retriever & Shepherd currently available for adoption at Rosalie and Friends. Could this be your new best friend? Learn more and apply today!
dogs.description:
Meet Rukus!
Rukus is a 3-month-old, 14lb Heinz 57 mixed-breed puppy  belittling have some shepherd in the mix with stunning brindle markings, the sweetest face, and a personality that's just as adorable as he is!
This happy little guy loves to play, especially if toys are involved. His absolute favorite game is tug-of-war, and he's always ready for a fun play session. After a day of adventures, Rukus settles down and sleeps through the night like a big boy.
Rukus is a smart puppy who is already learning his manners. He's working on sit, down, leave it, and leash skills, and he's eager to keep learning with positive reinforcement. He's also making great progress with potty training and does well when he's taken outside at appropriate puppy intervals.
Rukus would thrive in a home with a playful canine companion who can help burn off his puppy energy and show him the ropes. Like any young puppy, he'll need continued training, patience, and plenty of love, but he'll reward his family with endless smiles, cuddles, and fun.
If you're looking for a sweet, playful, and handsome brindle boy to grow up with your family, Rukus may be the perfect match!

    Prior to meeting or adopting any of our wonderful animals, we ask that you please fill out our online application: https://form.jotform.com/223268341300041

 We are a 100% volunteer organization and have to work other jobs to pay the bills. Please give us up to 48 hours to respond. 

Submission of an adoption application does not obligate you to adopt nor does it guarantee approval. We look forward to hearing from you. 


Please note all animals in the home must be altered, up to date on vaccines, and be on heartworm prevention. We understand there are some special cases and will take those into consideration.

dogs.name: Hutch
dogs.og: Meet Hutch, a Puppy Male Chihuahua currently available for adoption at Rosalie and Friends. Could this be your new best friend? Learn more and apply today!
dogs.description:
Meet Hutch
Chihuahua mix
Expected adult weight : 20-25lbs
This adorable Chihuahua mix boy is everything you could hope for in a puppy and then some. Whether you're looking for a hiking buddy, a couch cuddler, or a tiny shadow that thinks you're the greatest person on earth, this boy is ready to apply for the job.

A few reasons you'll fall in love:
 Perfect puppy with even sweeter personality .  Smart, eager to learn, and picking up new things every day.  Loving, affectionate, and happiest when hes  with his people.  Crate trained and doing great with house training as long as hes  let out on a consistent schedule.  Love exploring the backyard alongside his foster siblings and are always ready for the next little adventure.  After hes  burned off that puppy energy, hes  all about cuddling up for a well earned nap.

 Hutch is the more independent and would do just fine as an only dog in an active home where he can get plenty of exercise, adventures, and attention.  Due to his age, energy level, and love of exploring, no apartment living.

This boy is the perfect balance of playful and snuggly, and hes ready to bring endless laughs, love, and puppy kisses to their forever families.

Prior to meeting or adopting any of our wonderful animals, please fill out our online application:

https://form.jotform.com/223268341300041

We are a 100% volunteer organization and all work full-time jobs outside of rescue, so please allow up to 48 hours for a response. Submission of an application does not obligate you to adopt and does not guarantee approval.

dogs.name: Toofers
dogs.og: Meet Toofers, a Senior Male Pekingese & Chihuahua currently available for adoption at Rosalie and Friends. Could this be your new best friend? Learn more and apply today!
dogs.description:
Meet Toofers (AKA Tootie): an 8-pound senior  chihuahua/ Pekinese with the confidence of a 90-pound bouncer. 
Approximately 10 years old, Toofers has reached the glorious stage of life where he has boundaries, opinions, and absolutely no problem letting you know about either. He's a very chatty little man, so if you hear grunts, groans, or what sounds like tiny complaints, don't panic—that's just Toofers narrating his day.
His hobbies include: Being tucked under blankets like a baked potato. Demanding treats and pup cups. Cruising around in his stroller like the celebrity he believes he is. Play-fighting with his favorite human. Professional lap warming.
His ideal home? One where he can be the center of the universe. He'd love to be your one and only, but he may tolerate a calm, respectful small dog. Large dogs? Absolutely not. Cats? No thanks. Chickens? Let's just say... this tiny old man has attempted to throw paws with livestock, and we'd rather not revisit that chapter. 
He is leash and crate trained, mostly potty trained (just don't make an old man wait too long!), and happiest when his favorite person is nearby.
If you've been searching for a tiny, grumpy-looking, blanket-loving senior who talks back, snuggles hard, and wakes up every day ready to spread joy (and unsolicited opinions), Toofers is waiting to meet you

    Prior to meeting or adopting any of our wonderful animals, we ask that you please fill out our online application: https://form.jotform.com/223268341300041

 We are a 100% volunteer organization and have to work other jobs to pay the bills. Please give us up to 48 hours to respond. 

Submission of an adoption application does not obligate you to adopt nor does it guarantee approval. We look forward to hearing from you. 


Please note all animals in the home must be altered, up to date on vaccines, and be on heartworm prevention. We understand there are some special cases and will take those into consideration.

dogs.name: Christopher Robin
dogs.og: Christopher Robin has been adopted! Christopher Robin was a Yellow Labrador Retriever from Rosalie and Friends. Looking for a pet? Browse thousands of adoptable pets on Petfinder today!
dogs.description:
SPONSORED ADOPTION FEE!!

Meet Christopher!
If you are looking for a fun, smart, adventure-ready best friend, Christopher may be your guy.
This handsome young Lab has all the classic Lab qualities: energy, enthusiasm, and a love for life. 

He is active, playful, and always ready for whatever the day brings. The good news? He does have an off switch... he just occasionally needs a human reminder that naps are part of the schedule too.

Christopher is kennel trained, house trained, and is generally good on a leash. He is eager to learn, highly food motivated, and loves having a job to do, which makes him a great candidate for continued training.

When it comes to other dogs, Christopher has shown he can do very well with a variety of personalities and play styles. From energetic buddies to senior dogs, he adjusted nicely and even won over a selective canine friend who rarely plays. 

He does need proper introductions with new dogs, and because he can be a little socially enthusiastic, he may need supervision and guidance around very passive dogs.

One thing to know about Christopher: he is vocal during play! He talks a big game, but it is mostly sound effects and excitement. During his brief stay with someone, he showed no food resource guarding.

His biggest work-in-progress is jumping. We have been working on it, and he has already made progress, but he will need consistency and continued training. Thankfully, Christopher is a smart boy who genuinely wants to learn and connect with his people.

Christopher desperately needs a family, a routine, and people willing to help him continue becoming the incredible dog we know he can be. Christopher is neutered, up to date on shots and microchipped. 

Please help us share Christopher and find him the home he has been waiting for.
    Prior to meeting or adopting any of our wonderful animals, we ask that you please fill out our online application: https://form.jotform.com/223268341300041

 We are a 100% volunteer organization and have to work other jobs to pay the bills. Please give us up to 48 hours to respond. 

Submission of an adoption application does not obligate you to adopt nor does it guarantee approval. We look forward to hearing from you. 


Please note all animals in the home must be altered, up to date on vaccines, and be on heartworm prevention. We understand there are some special cases and will take those into consideration.

dogs.name: Cashew
dogs.og: Cashew has been adopted! Cashew was a Chihuahua from Rosalie and Friends. Looking for a pet? Browse thousands of adoptable pets on Petfinder today!
dogs.description:
Meet Cashew! 
Cashew is a Chihuahua mix with a heart that's even bigger than her adorably chunky frame. This sweet girl has never met a stranger. She loves everyone she meets and greets each new friend with a wagging tail and endless affection.
Cashew may only have one eye, but that doesn't stop her from looking at you with all the love in the world. Her gentle, easygoing personality makes her the kind of dog who can fit seamlessly into all kinds of homes and lifestyles.
Looking for a playmate for the kids? Cashew is ready to run around the yard and join in the fun. Prefer cozy nights on the couch? She's mastered the art of cuddling and will happily be your snuggle buddy.
Cashew also comes with excellent manners. She walks beautifully on a leash, is potty trained to a doggie door, and rides calmly in the car. Whether you're heading out on an adventure or staying in for a relaxing evening, she's just happy to be by your side.
If you're searching for a loyal, loving companion who will make every day a little brighter, Cashew is ready to meet you.
 Prior to meeting or adopting any of our wonderful animals, we ask that you please fill out our online application: https://form.jotform.com/223268341300041

 We are a 100% volunteer organization and have to work other jobs to pay the bills. Please give us up to 48 hours to respond.

dogs.name: Wasabi
dogs.og: Wasabi has been adopted! Wasabi was a Chihuahua from Rosalie and Friends. Looking for a pet? Browse thousands of adoptable pets on Petfinder today!
dogs.description:
Remember the little dog who was abandoned at Bayview Park with all of his belongings left behind?
Meet Wasabi.
At just 2 years old, this adorable Chihuahua mix has already experienced more uncertainty than any dog should. Left behind with no explanation, Wasabi found himself wondering where his family went. Thankfully, those days are behind him, and now he's ready to find the forever home he truly deserves.
Wasabi is a tiny little guy with a big personality. His foster mom says he looks like a teacup black Lab, complete with the cutest white socks on his front paws. He's light, lean, and absolutely loves being close to his people.
His potty training is coming along beautifully, and he's now letting his foster know when he needs to go outside. He does well with other dogs and enjoys playtime, though he admits he'd prefer to be first in line when it's time for cuddles. He can be a bit jealous of sharing lap privileges, but can you really blame him?
Wasabi is the definition of a companion dog. Whether you're heading out for errands, taking a walk, or settling in for a movie night, he's happiest right by your side. He walks wonderfully on a leash, fits comfortably in a carry bag, and is ready to accompany you on all of life's adventures.
He also has a hidden talent: singing. Wasabi regularly serenades his foster family when dinner is being prepared, when a door closes between them, or whenever he feels the moment calls for a song.
He has done well around cats, though he may give chase if they run. Once they stand their ground, however, he quickly remembers who's really in charge.
Wasabi's perfect home is one where he can be a constant companion, loyal shadow, professional lap warmer, and occasional vocalist. After being left behind once, we're hoping the next family he chooses will be his forever family.
If you're looking for a sweet, portable, affectionate best friend, Wasabi may be exactly who you've been waiting for.
    Prior to meeting or adopting any of our wonderful animals, we ask that you please fill out our online application: https://form.jotform.com/223268341300041

 We are a 100% volunteer organization and have to work other jobs to pay the bills. Please give us up to 48 hours to respond. 

Submission of an adoption application does not obligate you to adopt nor does it guarantee approval. We look forward to hearing from you. 


Please note all animals in the home must be altered, up to date on vaccines, and be on heartworm prevention. We understand there are some special cases and will take those into consideration.

dogs.og: Snowbelle has been adopted! Snowbelle was a Chihuahua from Rosalie and Friends. Looking for a pet? Browse thousands of adoptable pets on Petfinder today!
dogs.description:
Meet Snowbelle! 
Snowbelle is a darling 2-year-old Chihuweenie with a heart full of love and a talent for snuggling. This sweet girl is happiest curled up beside her favorite humans, whether it's on the couch or snoozing away in bed. If you're looking for a loyal companion, Snowbelle is your girlshe's a true Velcro dog who loves being close to her people.
Snowbelle can be a little shy when meeting men and appreciates a little time and patience to build trust. Once she feels comfortable, her affectionate personality shines through.
She also enjoys spending time outdoors, zooming around a fenced backyard and playing with other small dogs. Snowbelle would love a home where she can enjoy both cuddle time and a little fun in the sun.
If you're searching for a devoted best friend who will happily keep you company wherever you go, Snowbelle is ready to steal your heart! 
    Prior to meeting or adopting any of our wonderful animals, we ask that you please fill out our online application: https://form.jotform.com/223268341300041
